user_query: Father likes eggs for breakfast. Add a classic egg based breakfast option for him on the day with the Smoky Base Pork Dinner

fields.name: Classic Herb Omelette with Toast
fields.short_description: A timeless egg-based breakfast: fluffy three-egg omelette folded with fresh chives and cheddar, served with whole-grain buttered toast and a lemony tomato garnish.
fields.meal_suggestion: Whisk three eggs with a splash of milk, salt, and pepper. Melt a pat of butter in a nonstick skillet over medium heat, pour in eggs and gently push set edges toward the center as they cook. Sprinkle shredded cheddar and chopped chives on one half, fold and cook briefly until just set. Serve immediately with two slices of toasted whole-grain bread (lightly buttered) and a side of halved cherry tomatoes tossed with a squeeze of lemon, olive oil, salt, and cracked pepper.
fields.nutrition_note: Provides high-quality protein from eggs and calcium from cheddar. Whole-grain toast adds complex carbohydrates and fiber for sustained energy; tomatoes supply vitamin C and antioxidants. Moderate in saturated fat — reduce butter/cheese to lower saturated fat if desired.

result.reasoning: Father's Day 4 already contains 'Smoky' breakfast variations and likely pairs with the Smoky Base Pork Dinner on the same day; appending (position -1) adds a classic egg-focused option that aligns with the user's preference without disturbing existing ordered choices.
